channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: More rubbish dumped on the pavement, 22nd July
item.description:
This spot is always being used by flytippers

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stembridge Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Street light 26H 7 not working, 22nd July
item.description:
Street light 26H 7 not working not coming on at night start of allyway next to house 27 BR5 4JP
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highlands Road, Ramsden, Greater London

item.title: Blocked gulleys, 22nd July
item.description:
Blocked gulleys on both sides of the street outside fibgals bakery. There is a smells at tines

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trafalgar Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foot bridge fly tip, 22nd July
item.description:
Dumped suitcase, clothing & toys on footbridge over railway

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing commercial waste behind Wellington Parade, Blackfen Road, 22nd July
item.description:
A substantial accumulation of rubbish has developed in the service alleyway behind Wellington Parade, Blackfen Road. Waste bags are overflowing from and surrounding the commercial bins, with additional loose rubbish and discarded items obstructing the area. It is unclear whether this is due to a missed private waste collection, insufficient commercial waste capacity or fly-tipping. The accumulation is likely to attract vermin, create unpleasant smells and present a potential fire and access risk. A current photograph is attached. Please could the Council inspect the location, establish who is responsible for the waste and arrange for the appropriate action to be taken?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping slipping over on the street, 22nd July
item.description:
Lots of rubbish fly tipped flowing into the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arcola Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned overflowing rubbish bin, 22nd July
item.description:
A bin has been left out in front between 21 and 22 that has been filled and overflowing with rubbish that has been ripped open. It is also encouraging people to fly tip there

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colvestone Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tippong., 22nd July
item.description:
Number of black bags dumped by tree in Mickleham. St Paul's Cray. BR5 2SN 3 days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3-17, Mickleham Close, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Cement residuew from nearby house extension, 22nd July
item.description:
Nearby house works, cement residue just left on road from recent delivery, will harden if not removed soon.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Farm Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London

item.title: Dirty chair dumpted back of my home, 22nd July
item.description:
This chair has been dumped at the back of my home dirty filthy been there a,month can the council look into this please

item.title: Broken Paving, 22nd July
item.description:
Broken Paving, unattended for over three years

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Road, Charlton

item.title: Continued fly tipping, 22nd July
item.description:
Yet again the charity donation bin outside Bermondsey Arts Club is attracting fly tipping. Donating items are spilling out onto the street. This is an ongoing problem which needs a permanent solution. Please consider relocating this donation bin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Bridge Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 22nd July
item.description:
Bag of clothes dumped on grass now ripped by foxes and strewn over the grass Bottom of Timbercroft Lane grass area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albatross Street, Plumstead

item.title: Wires exposed, 22nd July
item.description:
There is a lampost with the wires exposed What3words ///fires.tens.gross
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlyle Road, Thamesmead, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish outside number 33 kempt Street, 22nd July
item.description:
All this is left outside number 33 kempt street instead of asking the council to take this,away its,a hazzard and dangerous to the,street could the council look into this,please,asap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kempt Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This bin should be taken away, 22nd July
item.description:
Im reporting this so called waste bin its niebeing ñeglected as has no bin inside ive been onto the councillors and asking for this to be taken away the whole bin would be good as the rubbish is now owing into my door way as its still being used as a rubbish bin its getting really tiresome now im asking for the council to take the whole thing away please asap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kempt Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 22nd July
item.description:
Dumbed black bags of waste on both sides of the pavement, lots of broken glass bottles on the west side of the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Haysleigh Gardens, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: LTN signs have been graffitied, 22nd July
item.description:
LTN signs have been graffitied so it looks like you are allowed through the barriers

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Upwood Road, Eltham

item.title: Back Garden of number 16 Bridge House., 22nd July
item.description:
Resident called as the tree inspection was carried out but no one has returned to prune the two trees.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bridge Approach, Chalk Farm, Greater London
